page_metadata.biotools__summary: Coronavirus Network Explorer is an exploratory tool to connect SARS-CoV-2 viral proteins to selected biological processes, diseases, and pathways. It is a tool for mining a large-scale knowledge graph for effects of SARS-CoV-2 on host cell function.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: Coronavirus Network Explorer is an exploratory tool to connect SARS-CoV-2 viral proteins to selected biological processes, diseases, and pathways. It is a tool for mining a large-scale knowledge graph for effects of SARS-CoV-2 on host cell function.
